# 06.03-final-revalidation: Revalidate installer and warnings

## Objective
Run final validation after Inno Setup and warning remediation changes.

## Scope
- Restore and build the solution.
- Publish x86, x64, and ARM64 outputs if packaging inputs changed.
- Document remaining warnings and validation limitations.

## Done When
The solution validates successfully after the post-upgrade installer and warning remediation work.
